summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Citius AI-Native Sales Agency landing page. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend fully functional with excellent integration, minor text formatting issue found.

ui_bugs.issue: Missing space in hero heading text: 'The AI Platform forSignal‑Driven Outbound' should be 'The AI Platform for Signal‑Driven Outbound'

integration_issues.issue: Smooth scroll navigation not positioning sections perfectly in viewport after click

passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint (GET /api/) returns 200 with correct message
Waitlist count endpoint (GET /api/waitlist/count) returns current count (4 entries)
Waitlist join with valid email (POST /api/waitlist) returns 200 with UUID, email, timestamp
Duplicate email submission returns 409 with 'Email already registered' error
Invalid email validation returns 400 with 'Invalid email address' error
All main landing page sections load correctly (hero, how-it-works, results, before-after, faq, final-cta, footer)
Dashboard mockup displays with correct stats (1,340 emails, 37% open rate, 13 meetings, $0 SDR cost)
Dashboard shows 5 prospect rows with names, companies, channels, and statuses
Waitlist form accepts valid email and shows success message
Duplicate email in final CTA form shows 'already on the list' error
How It Works section displays 3 step cards (01, 02, 03) with correct content
Results section shows correct metrics (90% lower CAC, 3-5x more calls, 80% automated)
Testimonials display Marcus K. and Jamie L. with 5-star ratings
Before vs After section shows 5 items each with correct icons (X vs checkmarks)
FAQ accordion with 6 questions opens and displays content correctly
Mobile menu toggle functionality works (opens/closes navigation)
Mobile responsive design displays correctly on 390x844 viewport
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix minor text spacing issue in hero heading and optionally improve navbar smooth scroll positioning
